title: Gilded Furnishing
description: Gilded Furnishing adds some decor but most importantly the Dull amethyst material and the 2 new weapons made from it
body:
# Gilded Furnishing
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3b95309812896abe520a58de64e59b9e16564c9.png)

Gilded furnishing is a mod for 1.20.1 version of fabric, aiming to add furnishing, weaponry and some Qol features to enhance your gameplay, you can add this to whatever modpacks you desire.

## Features:

### Weaponry:
- Dull Executioner Sword
- Crimson Needle
- Necromancer Sword
- Dull Rapier
- 
### Decor & Blocks :
- Tables from all the wood types
- Dull Lamps ( Deepslate, Blackstone, Gold variants )
- Poles ( Deepslate, Blackstone variants )
- Dull Amethyst block
- Dull Obsidian
- Monolith
- Iron grate

### Others :
- Titan Yarn
- Dull Amethyst
- Obsidian Chisel
